Container.Name: SpotifyBU
Container.Overview: SpotifyBU backs up Spotify metadata, checks a mounted Navidrome music folder, organizes matched files, and stages authorized provider downloads into clean Navidrome album folders. Set PUID/PGID to match NaviClean/Navidrome when sharing the same music library.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the SpotifyBU web UI.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Stores SpotifyBU settings, login credentials, metadata backups, logs, and SQLite database.

Config.Name: Music Library Path
Config.Description: Host path to the Navidrome music library. Use the same path shared with NaviClean/Navidrome.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID used by SpotifyBU inside the container. Match NaviClean/Navidrome on shared Unraid libraries, commonly 99.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID used by SpotifyBU inside the container. Match NaviClean/Navidrome on shared Unraid libraries, commonly 100.

Config.Name: SpotifyBU App Secret
Config.Description: Required long random value used to sign SpotifyBU login cookies. This is not your Spotify Client Secret.

Config.Name: Spotify Client ID
Config.Description: Spotify Developer Dashboard app Client ID. SpotifyBU uses PKCE and does not need the Spotify Client Secret.

Config.Name: SpotifyBU Public URL
Config.Description: Public URL for SpotifyBU, for example https://spotifybu.example.com. Leave blank only when proxy headers produce the correct Spotify redirect URI.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set true when accessing SpotifyBU only over HTTPS. Keep false for local HTTP.

Config.Name: Auth Mode
Config.Description: Use internal for SpotifyBU's login form or external when a trusted reverse proxy handles access control.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Container path for SpotifyBU config and database files.

Config.Name: Music Library Container Path
Config.Description: Container path for the mounted Navidrome music library.

Config.Name: Navidrome URL
Config.Description: Navidrome URL as seen by the SpotifyBU container.

Config.Name: Navidrome Username
Config.Description: Optional Navidrome username used to request scans and sync playlists.

Config.Name: Navidrome Password
Config.Description: Optional Navidrome password used with Navidrome Username.

Config.Name: Chown Music Library
Config.Description: Advanced repair option. Leave false unless you intentionally want SpotifyBU startup to recursively chown the entire mounted music library to PUID:PGID.
